# Why Your Assignments or Events Aren’t Showing on the Planner

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418644

If something isn't appearing on your Planner, one of the following is usually the cause.

## 1\. Check Your Filters

The Planner has filter options that control what's displayed. If **Remember filter selections** is enabled (found in [**Settings → Preferences**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings)), filters from a previous session may still be active.

  * A highlighted filter indicator means filters are currently active
  * Verify that **Assignments** and/or **Events** are selected in the filters
  * Confirm that the relevant class and category filters aren't excluding the items you're looking for

## 2\. The Class Group Is Hidden

If a class group is hidden, its associated assignments won't appear on the Planner. Check [**Classes**](https://app.heliumedu.com/classes)—hidden groups display a closed eye icon. Tap the icon to make the group visible again.

## 3\. You're in the Wrong View

The **Todos** view displays only Assignments, so Events will never appear there. Switch to **Week** , **Day** , **Month** , or **Agenda** view if you're looking for Events. See [Planner Views, and Changing Your Default](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418667) for more information.

## 4\. Term or Class Date Mismatch

Class schedules are tied to start and end date ranges. If the date you're viewing falls outside the class's or term's date range, assignments and schedules for that class won't display. Double-check that the dates being viewed in the calendar are within the date range of the term or class.

The **Todos** view only shows Assignments within the date range of the class's currently being displayed. An Assignment dated outside its class's start or end dates will still appear on the calendar views, but won't show in Todos.

You can verify these dates in [**Classes**](https://app.heliumedu.com/classes).

---

## Helium Classic

The same troubleshooting steps apply in Helium Classic. The key navigation differences are:

  * The **Remember filter selections** setting is at [**Account → Settings → Preferences**](https://www.heliumedu.com/settings/#tab-preferences)
  * Active filters are indicated by blue dropdown indicators on the calendar
  * [**Classes**](https://www.heliumedu.com/planner/classes) is found under the Planner menu

 __Helium Classic will remain available until July 31, 2026.__
